subject: Acme Corp Onboarding Follow-Up: Data Import & Walkthrough
body:
Hi Success Team,

I wanted to reach out regarding Acme Corp's onboarding completion last week. They've completed the initial setup, and I'm writing to check on their progress with the data import phase.

Would you be able to:

1. Confirm if they've encountered any issues with their initial data import
2. Reach out to see if they'd benefit from a technical walkthrough call
3. Let me know if they need any additional resources or support

Please feel free to offer them a scheduled call with our team to walk through best practices and answer any questions they have about the platform.

I'll follow up early next week on their status. Let me know if you need any other details.

Best,
Internal Communications
TechCorp
